summary: Frontend-only testing completed for TutorBird-style UI restructure. All 8 features verified and working correctly via Playwright automation.

issues: Tab labels are quite small (text-xs) - may be difficult to read on some displays

dashboard_event_tabs.description: Dashboard has 'Next 5' and 'Past 5' event tabs that switch correctly between upcoming and past events

event_actions_dialog.description: Clicking on an event in dashboard opens dialog with 'Mark Attendance' and 'View/Edit Event' buttons

families_invoices_page.description: Page loads with table showing Family, Contact, Group Tags, Balance, Auto-Invoice columns. Shows 'You're owed ₹X as of date' and 'Prepaid Balance' info

add_family_dialog.description: Add Family button opens dialog with name, email, phone, group tags, students multi-select, and auto-invoice toggle

settings_page_layout.description: Settings page has Business Settings title with business card on left side showing logo, country, timezone

settings_seven_tabs.description: Settings page has all 7 tabs: General, Accounts & Invoices, Email & SMS, Policies, Terminology, Currency, Alerts

settings_accounts_invoices.description: Accounts & Invoices tab shows Payment Methods, Default Balance Date options, Late Payment Fee settings (None/Fixed/Percentage)

settings_policies.description: Policies tab shows Booking Policy section (min/max advance booking, slot hold duration) and Cancellation Policy section (preferences, policy text)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Event tabs and dialog implementation follows TutorBird design with proper data-testid attributes
FamiliesInvoices.js: Properly structured page with fallback to basic parents endpoint if getFamiliesSummary fails
Settings.js: Comprehensive 7-tab implementation with proper state management and API integration
Sidebar.js: Menu properly updated to show 'Families & Invoices' instead of separate Parents/Invoices
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data - 4 students, 2 families (Rajesh Sharma, Anjali Patel), events in system
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TutorBird-style UI features verified. Dashboard event tabs (Next 5/Past 5) working with event action dialogs. Families & Invoices page at /families route working with all columns and Add Family dialog. Settings page at /settings has all 7 tabs (General, Accounts & Invoices, Email & SMS, Policies, Terminology, Currency, Alerts) with proper content in each. Key data-testid attributes: dashboard-page, families-invoices-page, settings-page, settings-tab-general, settings-tab-accounts, settings-tab-email, settings-tab-policies, settings-tab-terminology, settings-tab-currency, settings-tab-notifications, add-family-button, family-name-input, family-email-input, family-phone-input, family-students-select, auto-invoice-checkbox
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/event_actions_dialog.png - Event dialog with Mark Attendance and Edit options
.screenshots/add_family_dialog.png - Add Family dialog with all fields
